claims.summary: Verify that dynamic exploration noise is bounded and responds to spectral gradient and pressure evidence.
Run the proposed 1,000-tick lambda-gap decay observation in a bounded replay once a direct adapter is runnable; current ready_runnable_count is zero.
A manual live exploration-noise override to 0.15 requires Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, canary limits, and abort criteria.
Retuning live exploration noise as a function of entropy is Tier 5 regulation work and remains evidence-only.
